text: Had the writer's money been stolen?
I entered the hotel manager's office and sat down.
zh: 我走进酒店经理的办公室,坐了下来。

text: I had just lost ￡50 and I felt very upset.
zh: 我刚丢了50英镑,心里很不是滋味。

text: 'I left the money in my room,' I said, 'and it's not there now. '
zh: '我把钱放在房间里了,'我说,'现在不见了。'

text: The manager was sympathetic, but he could do nothing.
zh: 经理很同情我,但他也无能为力。

text: 'Everyone's losing money these days,' he said.
He started to complain about this wicked world but was interrupted by a knock at the door.
zh: 他开始抱怨这个世道险恶,却被一阵敲门声打断了。

text: A girl came in and put an envelope on his desk.
zh: 一个女孩走进来,把一个信封放在他的桌上。

text: 'I found this outside this gentleman's room,' she said.
zh: '我是在这位先生房间外面捡到的,'她说。

text: 'Well,' I said to the manager,'there is still some honesty in this world!'
zh: '看吧,'我对经理说,'这世上还是有诚实的人的!'
